title: The Curious Adventures of Mr. Wonderbird
writer: Hans Christian Andersen, Paul Grimault, Jacques Prévert
actors: Pierre Brasseur, Anouk Aimée, Serge Reggiani
plot: A chimney sweep and his beloved shepherdess are aided by Wonderbird (Sir Peter Ustinov) in their escape from a ruthless dictator.
awards: Nominated for 1 BAFTA Award2 wins & 2 nominations total
